memoryArtifacts.headline: Sir William Vychan
memoryArtifacts.description:
Sir) William GRIFFITH. 
Born (about 1415-S1)(about 1420-S1i), son of Gwilym ap Gruffydd and Jane (Jonet) Stanley. 

Other names for William were William Griffith Fychan, Gwilym Fychan ap Gwilym ap Gru …

zh.lifeSummary: 當William Fychan Ap Pengruffwnd於大約1415年出生在英國威爾斯凱爾納方史爾利安德加時，他的父親Gwilym ap Gwilym26歲，母親Janet de Stanley36歲。他於1447年之前與Alice Dalton結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1483年在威爾士布洛可爾享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Fychan Ap Pengruffwnd于大约1415年出生在英国威尔斯凱爾納方史爾利安德加时，他的父亲Gwilym ap Gwilym26岁，母亲Janet de Stanley36岁。他于1447年之前与Alice Dalton结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1483年在威尔士布洛可爾享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: Fychan
meanings: Welsh: A Welsh name of great antiquity, from vyckan, little, small; i.e. small in stature. Compare the surname Bychan and the Armoric Le Bihan.

en.lifeSummary: When William Fychan Ap Pengruffwnd was born about 1415, in Llandegai, Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Gwilym ap Gwilym, was 26 and his mother, Janet de Stanley, was 36. He married Alice Dalton before 1447. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died about 1483, in Pembrokeshire, Wales, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Fychan Ap Pengruffwnd est né environ 1415, à Llandegai, Caernarfonshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gwilym ap Gwilym, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Janet de Stanley, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Alice Dalton avant 1447. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé environ 1483, à Pembrokeshire, Galles, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Fychan Ap Pengruffwnd um 1415 in Llandegai, Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gwilym ap Gwilym 26 und seine Mutter Janet de Stanley 36. Er hat vor 1447 Alice Dalton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb um 1483 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Pembrokeshire, Wales.

ko.lifeSummary: William Fychan Ap Pengruffwnd(이)가 대략 1415년 영국 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 랜데가이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gwilym ap Gwilym(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Janet de Stanley(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1447년 이전 Alice Dalton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1483년 웨일스 p브로케실르에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Penrhyn, Llandygai, Caernarvonshire, Wal: пенрин би конвеи, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Fychan Ap Pengruffwnd родился около 1415 г. в местности лландегеи, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gwilym ap Gwilym было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Janet de Stanley, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Dalton перед 1447 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер около 1483 г. в местности пемброкешир, Уэльс в возрасте 70 лет.
